active_window_model.paper_00: outside active windows; inherited past-burden minimum information contract

notes: This pass corrects the suite from a 00-31 window model to a 01-32 active window model.
Paper 00 remains source-bound and referenced as the contract, but is not one of the four active 8-paper windows.
Many papers after Paper 05 lack optional run.py files; the structural kernel records that as optional executable expansion work rather than blocking the paper-kernel pass.
